assessment.summary_for_seller: Good run: you held context, answered on-point, and brought the conversation to a next step.

criteria.name: Contextual first contact
criteria.short_reason: First message is too generic and misses the signal context.
criteria.evidence_quote: Hi! Mellow handles contractor payments — we take on documents, KYC, payout with audit trail on our side. What's the most pressing issue in your situation right now?
criteria.label: Contextual opening

criteria.name: Compliance and boundary of responsibility
criteria.short_reason: Seller stated Mellow's control scope without overclaiming.
criteria.evidence_quote: Hi! Mellow handles contractor payments — we take on documents, KYC, payout with audit trail on our side. What's the most pressing issue in your situation right now?

criteria.short_reason: Language is adapted to the chosen persona.

criteria.name: Handling core objections
criteria.short_reason: At least two key objections addressed substantively.
criteria.evidence_quote: Hi! Mellow handles contractor payments — we take on documents, KYC, payout with audit trail on our side. What's the most pressing issue in your situation right now?

objections.objection: Ok but crypto + Wise has worked for two years. Why do I need this specifically now?

transcript.text: Hi! Mellow handles contractor payments — we take on documents, KYC, payout with audit trail on our side. What's the most pressing issue in your situation right now?
Ok but crypto + Wise has worked for two years. Why do I need this specifically now?
What is creating the most manual work right now: statuses, escalations, or reconciliation?
The budget side: what's the pricing model and is there a way to test before committing?
Specifically on cost, Mellow covers KYC, contractor docs, and the payment chain with audit trail on our side. Which part do you want more precision on?
Send this in writing and keep it short: who informs people, what the incident path looks like, and what they know in advance. If that is clear, we can continue.
Specifically on cost, Mellow covers KYC, contractor docs, and the payment chain with audit trail on our side. Which part do you want more precision on?
Send this in writing and keep it short: who informs people, what the incident path looks like, and what they know in advance. If that is clear, we can continue.
It feels like the basics are in place. A short 15-minute call on your exact case may be the cleanest next step. Would that work?
Send this in writing and keep it short: who informs people, what the incident path looks like, and what they know in advance. If that is clear, we can continue.
Let's put a narrow 15-minute walkthrough on the calendar just for this issue, without a broad pitch. What time works?
[No reply — the prospect went silent. Try a follow-up.]
Rather than a broad call, we can do a narrow 15-minute walkthrough just on the acute issue. Would that work?
Send this in writing and keep it short: who informs people, what the incident path looks like, and what they know in advance. If that is clear, we can continue.
Rather than a broad call, we can do a narrow 15-minute walkthrough just on the acute issue. Would that work?
Send this in writing and keep it short: who informs people, what the incident path looks like, and what they know in advance. If that is clear, we can continue.
The clean next step may be a short 15-minute walkthrough on the problem area only, without a broad pitch. Does that work?
[No reply — the prospect went silent. Try a follow-up.]
Specifically on cost, Mellow covers KYC, contractor docs, and the payment chain with audit trail on our side. Which part do you want more precision on?
Send this in writing and keep it short: who informs people, what the incident path looks like, and what they know in advance. If that is clear, we can continue.
Let's schedule a short 20-minute call and go through your case directly. What time works?
Send this in writing and keep it short: who informs people, what the incident path looks like, and what they know in advance. If that is clear, we can continue.
